title: Smoking/Vaping Cessation Support - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Smoking/Vaping Cessation Support 4 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT TOBACCO PREVENTION AND EDUCATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Tobacco Prevention and Education Program works with diverse partners statewide to promote smoke-free environments and communities, reduce the influence of tobacco product marketing, and encourage tobacco users to quit. These programs engage their communities and challenge them to become healthier through preventing tobacco use. 528 E Main Street Suite E John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 575-0429 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL CANCER INSTITUTE CONTACT CENTER CANCER INFORMATION SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about cancer, referral services, and support for smoking/vaping cessation. 9609 Medical Center Drive Building 9609 MSC 9760 Bethesda, MD 20892 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm Email (800) 422-6237 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW PRIORITIES FAMILY SERVICES NEW PRIORITIES FAMILY SERVICES BEND MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE ABUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling, couples counseling, group counseling, alcohol and drug assessment, informational groups, recovery planning and relapse prevention, DUII information classes and diversion treatment, smoking cessation, case management, and self-help support groups. Transportation can be arranged. 389 SW Scalehouse Court Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-7pm, Friday 8:30am-5:30pm Email (541) 306-4446 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW PRIORITIES FAMILY SERVICES NEW PRIORITIES FAMILY SERVICES REDMOND MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE ABUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling, couples counseling, group counseling, alcohol and drug assessment, informational groups, recovery planning and relapse prevention, DUII information classes and diversion treatment, smoking cessation, case management, and self-help support groups.
